name: Inefficient Algorithmic Complexity
description: An algorithm in the product has an inefficient worst-case computational complexity that can be triggered by an attacker using crafted input to force worst-case execution paths, causing CPU or memory exhaustion and denial of service.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides attacker-controlled input to a TRANSFORM node running an algorithm with super-linear worst-case complexity (regex matching, hash table operations, sorting, XML/JSON parsing) without a CONTROL node enforcing input size limits, timeouts, or complexity bounds
